arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne to Chelsea transfer truth as Man City told shock Premier League return stance
arts.sum: De Bruyne joined Chelsea from KRC Genk in January 2012 before returning to his boyhood club on loan for the remainder of the season . He won six Premier League titles, five League Cups, three Community Shields, two FA Cups, the Champions League and the Club World Cup. De Bruyne will go down as one of the greatest players to play in the English top flight – but his career could have taken a different route had he stayed at Stamford Bridge .

arts.ttl: “I had a great time” – Player loved Chelsea and Crystal Palace spells, can’t wait to take on Tottenham
arts.sum: Michy Batshuayi has insisted that he loved his time in London with Chelsea and Crystal Palace and is now looking forward to a return to take on Tottenham. The striker has been speaking to Eintracht Frankfurt’s official website as the gear up to take on Tottenham in the Europa League quarterfinals. Eintracht travel to Tottenham The post “I had a great time” – Player loved Chelsea and Crystal Palace spells, can’t wait to take on Tottenham appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Chelsea solve Jadon Sancho Man Utd transfer dilemma as Enzo Maresca sent 'next Neymar' reminder
arts.sum: Estevao has now featured 16 times for Palmeiras this year, scoring six goals. The 17-year-old winger, who the Blues signed from Palmeiras for £29m in June 2024, fired his boyhood club to victory against Sporting Cristal in the CONMEBOL Libertadores on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Henry could return for Brentford against Chelsea
arts.sum: Rico Henry could return to the Brentford squad for Sunday’s west London derby against Chelsea. The left-back has played just three minutes in the league this season – as a late substitute against Manchester City in January – and has been out with a hamstring injury since. But he featured in a recent B-team match […] The post Henry could return for Brentford against Chelsea appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Brentford vs. Chelsea: Enzo Maresca's side looking to extend 25-year streak in Premier League game
arts.sum: Chelsea will be bidding to extend a 25-year streak when they make the short trip to face Brentford in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon.
